zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Vieuxpont於大約1235年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比時，她的父親John de Vipont Lord of Appleby25歲，母親Sibyl de Ferrers20歲。她於1250年與Richard de Vernon在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1284年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Vieuxpont于大约1235年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比时，她的父亲John de Vipont Lord of Appleby25岁，母亲Sibyl de Ferrers20岁。她于1250年与Richard de Vernon在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1284年在英国英格兰德比夏爾哈登 霍爾享年50岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Vieuxpont was born about 1235, in Appleby, Westmorland, England, her father, John de Vipont Lord of Appleby, was 25 and her mother, Sibyl de Ferrers, was 20. She married Richard de Vernon in 1250, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1284, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

Elle a épousé Richard de Vernon en 1250, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1284, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Vieuxpontが約1235年にイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーで生まれた時，父John de Vipont Lord of Applebyは25歳，母Sibyl de Ferrersは20歳であった。1250年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでRichard de Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1284年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Vieuxpont(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Vipont Lord of Appleby(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl de Ferrers(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1250년 영국 더비실르에서 Richard de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1284년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하던 홀에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Vieuxpont родилась около 1235 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Vipont Lord of Appleby было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Ferrers, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Vernon в 1250 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1284 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
